title: 'Beyond the Barre' dazzles audience
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna community was...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna community was treated to Sidwell Roman's School of Ballet's annual year-end recital on 5 and 6 December.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The Knysna community was treated to Sidwell Roman's School of Ballet's annual year-end recital on 5 and 6 December."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The two-night showcase welcomed a combined 572 spectators, filling Knysna Primary School Hall with families, friends and supporters."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's production, titled Beyond the Barre, featured dancers across all levels; from four -year-old first-time performers to experienced adult-level seniors.","html":"This year's production, titled Beyond the Barre, featured dancers across all levels; from four -year-old first-time performers to experienced adult-level seniors."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Under the choreography of Courtney-Drew Meyer and Sidwell Roman, the performance showcased the school's commitment to classical discipline and creative expression.","html":"Under the choreography of Courtney-Drew Meyer and Sidwell Roman, the performance showcased the school's commitment to classical discipline and creative expression."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The dancers were glowing with pride, and you could literally see it on their faces. Every late afternoon rehearsal, every correction, every wobble and every win; it all came together on that stage,\" said Meyer.","html":"\"The dancers were glowing with pride, and you could literally see it on their faces. Every late afternoon rehearsal, every correction, every wobble and every win; it all came together on that stage,\" said Meyer."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Swansong","html":"Swansong"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This year's event held particular emotional significance as three senior dancers, Alysa Stead, Kiara Stead and Cayden Bean, performed their final recital before graduating from the ballet school.","html":"This year's event held particular emotional significance as three senior dancers, Alysa Stead, Kiara Stead and Cayden Bean, performed their final recital before graduating from the ballet school."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Their closing bow drew an extended applause and emotion from their teachers and families."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"One of the graduates, Cayden, will be pursuing his ballet studies at the Ballet Academy East in New York next year, which is a significant achievement for a local ballet school and the dancer himself.","html":"One of the graduates, Cayden, will be pursuing his ballet studies at the Ballet Academy East in New York next year, which is a significant achievement for a local ballet school and the dancer himself."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
